headline: Agentic engineering and the surrounding harness moved to the center of AI coding practice this week.
body: The dominant rotation is toward agentic engineering, where Google's playbook frames the model as 10 percent of success and the surrounding context, tools, guardrails, and verification as 90 percent, and an Agentic OS approach builds loop engineering and memory management atop Claude Code [2][8]. Practitioners are reporting how code style affects token costs and observing that LLMs are displacing human code review and abstraction work [1][5]. On evaluation, Latent Space describes a shift toward Meta-style testing harnesses becoming a standard methodology [3]. Separately, Anthropic accused Alibaba of illicitly extracting AI capabilities, and Europe is resisting Washington's chip export restrictions [0][6].
